Order: (403) 275-2722

Specialty Pizza

Californian

Lighter pie, vegetable-forward. Good lunch option.

Order — (403) 275-2722

What’s On It

  • Tomatoes
  • Spinach
  • Mushrooms
  • Red onion
  • Feta
  • Mozzarella

Sizes & Crust Options

  • Medium — also available with gluten-free crust
  • Large — half-and-half toppings available
  • Extra Large — half-and-half toppings available
  • Thin Crust — Medium, Large, or Extra Large

Pricing varies by pizza. Call (403) 275-2722 for the current price on this pie, or see the full menu for all options.

How To Order

Phone (recommended for delivery): (403) 275-2722 — our in-house driver brings it to your door.

Or via: Skip the Dishes, Uber Eats, DoorDash.

Dine in: Walk up — there’s usually a booth.
